name: @beaver-ai/cli
description: Beaver AI CLI — secondary scripting/headless surface

scripts.build: esbuild src/bin.ts --bundle --platform=node --target=node22 --format=esm --outfile=dist/bin.mjs --packages=bundle --banner:js="import { createRequire as __cr } from 'module'; const require = __cr(import.meta.url);" && node scripts/copy-data-files.mjs && node scripts/bundle-node.mjs
